label: Jump Street
blurb: 21 AND 22 Jump Street. Undercover, again. Name who said the line.

quotes.hint: 22 — squeaked out mid-drug-deal when asked his name

quotes.q: You have the right to remain... an attorney.
Captain, Korean Jesus is right there!
quotes.hint: 22 — pointing across the new Vietnamese church

quotes.q: I really thought this job would have more car chases and explosions.
You do have the right to be an attorney, if you want to...
quotes.hint: 21 — loyally backing up his partner's legal theory

quotes.q: Slam poetry. Yelling! Angry! Waving my hands a lot!
quotes.hint: 22 — the Cynthia performance, described from within

quotes.q: Infiltrate the dealers, find the supplier.
quotes.hint: Both films — the mission, slammed into the desk

quotes.q: We're reviving a canceled undercover police program from the eighties.
quotes.hint: 21 — because the guys in charge are out of ideas

quotes.q: Do the same thing as last time. Everyone's happy.
quotes.hint: 22 — the entire sequel's thesis, stated out loud
